description: Extract unsteady flow simulation results from the Muncie HEC-RAS model ('/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf') to analyze stage-discharge hysteresis (loop rating curves). For the most upstream, most downstream, and one middle cross-section, calculate the Maximum Loop Width (maximum discharge difference between rising and falling limbs at the same stage) and the Loop Width Percentage (Max Loop Width / Peak Flow * 100). Save a summary CSV to '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/loop_rating_summary.csv' with columns: 'river_station', 'position' (upstream/middle/downstream), 'peak_stage_ft', 'peak_flow_cfs', 'max_loop_width_cfs', and 'loop_width_pct'. Generate a plot showing the Stage vs. Discharge loops for these three locations at '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/loop_rating_curves.png'.
